ground_truth.title: 11 Best Freelance Blockchain Developers for Hire in December 2025 | Toptal®
ground_truth.main_content: Toptal presents a curated list of top freelance Blockchain developers available for hire. Each developer is verified as an expert in Engineering with proven experience in blockchain technology, smart contracts, DeFi, NFTs, and related technologies. The talent pool includes professionals from around the world across various time zones (UTC-08:00 to UTC+08:00), representing countries such as United States, Canada, Brazil, United Kingdom, Poland, India, Thailand, and Malaysia. Featured developers include Daniel Trinh (Senior Blockchain Programmer and Consultant, UTC-08:00, US), Sjon-Paul Brown (Freelance Blockchain Engineer, UTC-07:00, US), David Braun (Expert Blockchain Programmer, UTC-06:00, US), Julian Cislo (Blockchain Coder, UTC-05:00, Canada), Alisson Reinaldo Silva (Accomplished Blockchain Freelancer, UTC-03:00, Brazil), Harish Gupta (Toptal Blockchain Developer, UTC+00:00, UK), Robert Pardela (Blockchain Engineer, UTC+01:00, Poland), Kaustav Chakraborty (Blockchain Freelancer, UTC+05:00, India), John R. Kosinski (Blockchain Coder, UTC+07:00, Thailand), Mohammadi Gheis (Accomplished Blockchain Freelancer, UTC+08:00, Malaysia), and Sven Meyer (Blockchain Coder, UTC+01:00, Germany). All developers offer services in blockchain development, smart contracts, Solidity, Ethereum, Web3.js, and various other blockchain technologies.
with: Toptal is a network of top Blockchain developers, engineers, consultants, and designers.
Clients rate Toptal Blockchain developers 4.9/5.0 on average based on 3,572 reviews.
I am a lead Solidity developer with five years of experience in development and four in Blockchain.
Toptal offers top Blockchain developers on an hourly, part-time, or full-time contract basis.
Julian is a full-stack Web 3.0 developer and consultant specializing in solidity smart contracts design, development, and security considerations.
